{"parentUuid":"a8349d1e-7080-4307-9e15-5fefc804b909","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01F3Nk5Zn43Ee5EZzk6ENcpJ","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"## סיכום פרויקט — עיצוב חזית הדבקה על זכוכיות גוניור\n\n---\n\n### המבנה הפיזי\n\nמהסקיצה ומהתמונות — חנות על פינת רחוב, חזית שחורה עם שמשות גדולות.\n\n**חזית ראשית** (מקבילה לסוקולוב):\n\n| פתח | רוחב (ס\"מ) | גובה (ס\"מ) | הערה |\n|-----|-----------|-----------|------|\n| 4 | 55 | 250 | שמאל מהכניסה |\n| **כניסה/יציאה** | — | — | בין 4 ל-5 |\n| 5 | 55 | 250 | ימין מהכניסה |\n| 1 | 211 | 250 | |\n| A | 390 | 250 | |\n| B | 310 | 250 | |\n| C | 317 | 251 | |\n\n**אגף קופות** (ניצב, שמאל):\n\n| פתח | רוחב | גובה |\n|-----|------|------|\n| 2 | 253 | 250 |\n| 3 | 250 | 250 |\n\n**פינה ימנית קיצונית:**\n\n| פתח | רוחב | גובה |\n|-----|------|------|\n| D | 221 | 251 |\n| E | 467 | 230 |\n\n---\n\n### סגנון גרפי (מתמונת הדוגמה)\n\nמיקס בין **תצלומי מוצרים אמיתיים** (דגים, בשר, ירקות, מוצרי חלב) + **אייקונים מאוירים בקו** (לא מלאים), על **רקע אפור כהה**.\n\n---\n\n### מה שעדיין לא ברור\n\n1. פלט סופי — SVG לכל פתח? PDF לדפוס?\n2. רקע הזכוכית — שקוף / כהה / אחר?\n3. לוגו/מיתוג של גוניור?\n4. ה-SVG \"3 / 24/7\" — קשור לכאן?\n\n---\n\nממשיך?"}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":3,"cache_creation_input_tokens":461,"cache_read_input_tokens":53730,"output_tokens":788,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":461,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":3,"output_tokens":788,"cache_read_input_tokens":53730,"cache_creation_input_tokens":461,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":461},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CbpbtUgvzkxpX1cmvQEKj","type":"assistant","uuid":"f07cada0-29d9-491f-b727-9e47147138b0","timestamp":"2026-06-07T21:23:29.211Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"c:\\Users\\yaniv\\עיצוב חזית הדבקה על זכוכיות גוניור","sessionId":"072992a8-1ac8-470e-9501-4c3cf2fd5163","version":"2.1.168","gitBranch":"master"}

This creates a natural visual progression that guides customers through the store's layout.\n\nLooking at the panel arrangement, the left side with the cashier area could anchor the closing/checkout theme or feature fresh items, the entrance panels would emphasize abundance and welcome, the main facade would showcase the category flow, and the corner panels would wrap up with seafood or pantry items. Now I'm drafting the Gemini Imagen prompts—they need to be clear and detailed in English to work effectively with the image generation model.\n\nFor the overall aesthetic, I'm envisioning a dark charcoal background with a mix of photorealistic food product cutouts and hand-drawn outline illustrations, arranged in a flat lay style with muted tones punctuated by natural food colors. The left panels near the cashier would showcase fresh produce like tomatoes, peppers, and citrus, while the entrance panels would convey abundance and welcome.\n\nNow I'm reconsidering the panel layout and story structure. The largest central panel should be the hero moment—probably featuring proteins like meat and fish—with surrounding panels for bakery and dairy, pantry staples, drinks and snacks, and premium or exotic items. But looking at the reference more carefully, everything feels mixed together rather than strictly categorized, so I need to think about what single narrative thread ties a supermarket together visually.\n\nA few directions come to mind: a \"farm to table\" progression showing raw ingredients becoming prepared items, a \"rainbow of freshness\" that uses color to guide the eye across the facade, or simply organizing by department. The color and category approach feels most practical and visually compelling for this kind of display.\n\nI'm now working on the technical brief with specific aspect ratios for each panel—the entrance panel is portrait-oriented, the middle sections are mostly square, there's a very narrow vertical accent piece, and the rightmost panel is the widest. I'll structure this as a prompt document with global style guidelines, panel-by-panel specifications, and technical requirements that can be sent to an image generation tool. Looking at the panel dimensions more carefully, I can see panels 4 and 5 are both very tall and narrow, while panels 1, 2, and 3 range from slightly portrait to perfectly square, and panels A through E are all landscape-oriented. I'm thinking about the visitor journey starting from the entrance between panels 4 and 5, which would be the first impression as people approach the installation.\n\nFor the story concept, I want to suggest a thematic flow called \"שפע הטבע\" that moves from fresh farm ingredients near the entrance through proteins in the central panels and toward pantry items at the edges. I'll prepare prompts for Gemini in English since that tends to work better with image generation, creating a master style guide and then individual variations for each panel that maintain visual consistency while telling this progression. The cashier panels bring a lighter, more energetic feel with citrus and berries, while the corner piece acts as a transitional bridge, and the rightmost panel showcases premium items like fine cheeses and specialty proteins. {"parentUuid":"49687c31-5d75-40b1-aacd-40d134ca41b1","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01RJ9moLf2gJqedpoS3Rd8kx","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"מעולה. כותב את הבריף המלא עכשיו.\n\n---\n\n## בריף לג'מיני — עיצוב חזית גוניור\n\n---\n\n### פרומפט מאסטר (להוסיף לכל פתח)\n\n```\nPhotorealistic large-format vinyl sticker design for a storefront glass window.\nDark charcoal gray background (#2B2B2B).\nMix of: high-resolution photorealistic food product cutouts with soft drop shadows,\nand simple hand-drawn outline illustrations of food items in cyan, yellow and green.\nNo text. No logos. No people.\nScattered abundance layout. Premium supermarket aesthetic.\nUltra high resolution, suitable for large format print.\n```\n\n---\n\n### פרומפט לכל פתח\n\n**פתח 4 + פתח 5** — יחסי גובה-רוחב `1:4`\n```\n[Master prompt] + Fresh herbs and colorful vegetables arranged vertically:\nrosemary, basil, parsley, cherry tomatoes, carrots, green peppers.\nTall narrow vertical composition.\n```\n\n---\n\n**פתח 1** — יחסי גובה-רוחב `4:5`\n```\n[Master prompt] + Dairy products: cheese wheels, cheese triangles,\neggs, yogurt cups, butter block. Portrait composition.\n```\n\n---\n\n**פתח A** ⭐ — יחסי גובה-רוחב `3:2`\n```\n[Master prompt] + Hero panel: rich abundance of mixed fruits and vegetables:\ntomatoes, bell peppers, avocados, citrus fruits, broccoli, kiwi, strawberries,\nspinach. Bold, full, overflowing composition. Landscape format.\n```\n\n---\n\n**פתח B** — יחסי גובה-רוחב `5:4`\n```\n[Master prompt] + Fresh proteins: whole fish, salmon fillet,\nbeef steak, chicken cuts. Landscape composition.\n```\n\n---\n\n**פתח C** — יחסי גובה-רוחב `5:4`\n```\n[Master prompt] + Pantry items: olive oil bottles, glass jars,\ndried pasta, spice jars. Landscape composition.\n```\n\n---\n\n**פתח 3** (קופות) — יחסי גובה-רוחב `1:1`\n```\n[Master prompt] + Citrus fruits and berries: oranges, lemons,\ngrapefruits, strawberries, blueberries. Bright energetic composition. Square format.\n```\n\n---\n\n**פתח D** — יחסי גובה-רוחב `1:1`\n```\n[Master prompt] + Specialty items: fine cheeses, cured meats,\nexotic fruits.
